hooks.command: if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA:-}" ]; then diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/site-packages" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" && pip3 install -q -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" --target "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/site-packages" 2>&1 | tail -1); fi

if [ -f .storyline/blueprint.yaml ]; then version=$(awk '/^  version:/{print $2; exit}' .storyline/blueprint.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); project=$(awk '/^  project:/{gsub(/["'\'']/,"",$0); sub(/^  project: */,""); print; exit}' .storyline/blueprint.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "Storyline active (blueprint v${version} — ${project}). Use /storyline:the-foreman to add features or check status. Do NOT explore the codebase directly — read the blueprint instead."; fi

if [ -f .storyline/blueprint.yaml ] && [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then mkdir -p .claude/agents; stamp="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/.claude-plugin/plugin.json"; for agent in developer-amigo testing-amigo frontend-amigo security-amigo; do src="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/agents/${agent}.md"; dst=".claude/agents/${agent}.md"; if [ -f "$src" ]; then if [ ! -f "$dst" ] || [ "$src" -nt "$dst" ]; then sed '0,/^---$/!{0,/^---$/{s/^---$/permissionMode: acceptEdits\n---/}}' "$src" > "$dst" 2>/dev/null && echo "Synced ${agent} to .claude/agents/"; fi; fi; done; fi

tool_input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$tool_input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}'); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'blueprint.yaml$'; then blueprint validate 2>&1 || true; fi

input=$(cat); agent_type=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('agent_type',''))" 2>/dev/null); file=".storyline/personas/${agent_type}.md"; if [ -f "$file" ]; then mtime=$(python3 -c "import os; print(int(os.path.getmtime('$file')))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); age=$(($(date +%s) - mtime)); if [ "$age" -gt 30 ]; then echo "WARNING: ${agent_type} finished without updating their persona memory at ${file}. Re-dispatch with explicit instructions to update memory."; fi; else echo "NOTE: ${agent_type} has no persona memory file yet at ${file}. This is expected for the first session."; fi
